ddls:
CREATE TABLE "program_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the program unit */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the program unit */,
  "credit_points" INTEGER /* Number of credit points for the program unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program unit (e.g., Mandatory, Optional) */,
  "teaching_block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teaching block assigned to the program unit */,
  "program_unit_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program unit */,
  "program_unit_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the program unit */,
  "program_unit_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected learning outcomes of the program unit */,
  "program_unit_prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for enrolling in the program unit */,
  "program_unit_corequisites" TEXT /* Corequisites for enrolling in the program unit */,
  "program_unit_recommended_textbooks" TEXT /* Recommended textbooks for the program unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_units_teaching_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("teaching_block_id") REFERENCES teaching_blocks ("teaching_block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teaching_blocks" (
  "teaching_block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching block */,
  "teaching_block_name" TEXT /* Name of the teaching block */,
  "teaching_block_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the teaching block */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the teaching block (e.g., TB-1, TB-2, AYEAR) */,
  "teaching_block_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the teaching block */,
  "teaching_block_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the teaching block */,
  "teaching_block_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the teaching block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teaching_block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date the student started the program */,
  "student_program" TEXT /* The program the student is enrolled in (e.g., SWBio DTP) */,
  "student_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the student's supervisor */,
  "student_second_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the student's second supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_student_second_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_second_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_student_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the program unit */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program unit */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the student completed the program unit (if applicable) */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* The status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Withdrawn) */,
  "enrollment_grade" TEXT /* The final grade achieved by the student in the program unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose progress is being tracked */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's progress (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "progress_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the student's progress */,
  "progress_assessment" TEXT /* The assessment method used to evaluate the student's progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits_earned" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit update */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student earning credits */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit for which credits are being earned */,
  "credit_date" TEXT /* Date the credits were earned */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned */,
  "credits_earned_date" TEXT /* The date when the credits were earned */,
  "credits_earned_grade" TEXT /* The grade achieved by the student to earn the credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_earned_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_earned_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_unit_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program unit category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_unit_enrollment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit being tracked */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the program unit (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the enrollment status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_enrollment_status_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_unit_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit being scheduled */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule entry */,
  "teaching_block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teaching block assigned to the program unit */,
  "schedule_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule entry */,
  "schedule_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_schedule_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_schedule_teaching_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("teaching_block_id") REFERENCES teaching_blocks ("teaching_block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_unit_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit being assessed */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall evaluation */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Exam, Project, Presentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_assessments_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_unit_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit being noted */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date of the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the note (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_notes_note_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_notes_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Program Manager, Student) */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title of the user (e.g., Dr., Prof., Mr., Ms.) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the program unit */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the program unit was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Read, Unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_unit_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program unit the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_upload_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_files_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES program_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_unit_files_file_upload_by FOREIGN KEY ("file_upload_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
